title: Hooligan BMX / Gap Hill Speed Shop 1:24 Radical Rick Figure and Scene
source_title: Hooligan BMX - Gap Hill Speed Shop - 1/24 Radical Rick Figure & Scene
issue_title: The Cast Steps Off the Page
creator_display: Hooligan BMX; Damian X. Fulton; John Stancliff / Gap Hill Speed Shop
alt: Large unpainted Radical Rick figure beside a small enclosed 1:24-scale Radical Rick bicycle scene against a brick wall.
summary: A custom 1:24-scale Radical Rick figure and bicycle scene. The related Lititz BMX recording dossier credits Hooligan BMX for the figure, Damian X. Fulton for Radical Rick, and John Stancliff / Gap Hill Speed Shop for the painted bicycle and scene.
provenance: Current Lititz BMX holding; documented through a related unboxing and first-examination record.
claims: The collaboration credits are sourced from the compiled recording dossier; the artifact entry itself supplied no further production details.
details: Includes a small figure, bicycle and display scene in a clear case.
Supplied photograph also places the scale scene beside a larger unpainted Radical Rick figure for visual comparison.
The complete collaborative credit is preserved from the related unboxing dossier.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
